title: Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Document hosted on Thailand's National Cyber Security Agency (NCSA / สกมช.) domain explaining post-quantum cryptography and the need for Thai organisations to prepare information systems for the arrival of quantum computers and adopt PQC standards.

title: QUANTA: National Post-Quantum Cryptography Readiness Platform
summary: NCSA's national platform (QUANTA) to lead Thailand's transition to the quantum era, educating and preparing public and private organisations and providing tools and labs to support migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography standards.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Migration Roadmap (QUANTA)
summary: NCSA phased PQC migration roadmap setting out discovery and risk assessment, PQC integration, and full system migration, targeting completion of the national transition to quantum-resistant cryptography by 2035.

title: Recommended Post-Quantum Cryptography Standards (QUANTA)
summary: NCSA QUANTA page recommending NIST PQC standards for Thai organisations: FIPS 203 (ML-KEM) for key encapsulation, FIPS 204 (ML-DSA) for digital signatures, and FIPS 205 (SLH-DSA) for long-term archival.
